utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 sections. The plan lists both with specific plans, costs, and a total monthly cost. Fully specified. 2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan lists home_contents and photography_equipment with costs and a total monthly cost; this satisfies home/contents and relevant property items, so fully specified. 3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. The plan lists a basic travel plan with cost, a specific June upgrade with cost, and total monthly cost; fully specified. 4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists professional liability, teaching liability with amounts and costs, mentions existing services and notes replacement, and provides a total monthly cost; sufficiently specified. 5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides ongoing monthly cost, annual cost, a specific one-time additional cost, activation date, and compliance note; fully specified.
